The '''Cronese Sweeps''' were a conquering campaign by the [[Tionese (group)/Legends|Tionese]] noble and pirate [[Xer VIII|Xer]] within the [[Cronese Mandate/Legends|Cronese Mandate]] before the creation of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Prelude==
Following the [[Battle of Chandaar|defeat]] of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Ferece]] at [[Chandaar]], Xer installed himself as the new [[King of Cron]] and launched a campaign to take complete control of the [[Kingdom of Cron]].<ref name="Xim Week" />

==The campaign==
Xer began his campaign by sending [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]] and [[Noble/Legends|nobles]] he considered worthy into battle against rebellious [[Cronese]] worlds and independent planets on the kingdom's borders, taking their heirs hostage as guarantees of loyalty. The incompetents were eliminated with their families and followers.<ref name="Xim Week" />

However, the most-feared warlord of the Cronese Sweeps was Xer's teenage son, [[Xim/Legends|Xim]]. Xim and his legions became famous after his brutality during the conquests of [[Pasmin]], [[Eibon]] and [[Nuswatta]]<ref name="Xim Week" /> and the slaughter of Cronese [[Noble/Legends|nobility]].<ref name="TEGtW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

==Aftermath==
The Cronese Sweeps created a united and powerful Kingdom of Cron, boasting a battle-tested starfleet. Xer soon thought to expand his territory in the entire [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]].<ref name="Xim Week" />

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' erroneously refers to the Sweeps as occurring in 25,120 BBY, a decade after Xer's son [[Xim/Legends|Xim]] had already assumed the throne.
